question.description: 要在百度AI问答上提问的问题

name: baidu3

sampleInput.question: 什么是人工智能？请用一句话简要说明。

annotations.originalSelector: div:nth-of-type(1) > div._chat-container_r2am5_1 > div._chat-container-body_r2am5_1 > div._chat-container-wrapper_r2am5_4:nth-of-type(2) > div._chat-container-pc_17wcg_8 > div._chat-container-main-wrapper_17wcg_17 > div._new-page_17wcg_35:nth-of-type(2) > div:nth-of-type(1) > div.chat-input-home:nth-of-type(2) > div.chat-input-background > div.input-root > div.ci-root.ci-ai-search > div.two-line-input:nth-of-type(1) > div.ci-wrapper.ci-normal-wrapper:nth-of-type(4) > div.ci-container:nth-of-type(1) > div.ci-tool:nth-of-type(3) > div.ci-left-tool:nth-of-type(1) > div.ci-left-tools-wrapper:nth-of-type(1) > div.model-select-wrapper:nth-of-type(1) > span.ci-tooltip > div.ci-model-button > div.internet-search-icon > span.deep-search-text
annotations.reason: Simplified the extremely long nested selector to target the deep search text span directly, which is more robust against DOM structure changes

steps.name: 输入问题并开启深度思考模式

annotations.originalSelector: div:nth-of-type(1) > div._chat-container_r2am5_1 > div._chat-container-body_r2am5_1 > div._chat-container-wrapper_r2am5_4:nth-of-type(2) > div._chat-container-pc_9xsfz_152 > div._chat-container-main-wrapper_9xsfz_162:nth-of-type(1) > div._chat-container-main_9xsfz_5:nth-of-type(2) > div._chat-container-main-area_9xsfz_5.chat-container-main-area > div._chat-container-main-stream_9xsfz_15 > div._chat-body-container_u2k25_1 > div._content-area_u2k25_9 > div.conversation-flow-content._scroll-content_u2k25_32 > div.chat-qa-container:nth-of-type(3) > div.conversation-flow-answer-container._answer-container_u2k25_22:nth-of-type(2) > div.answer-box > div.chat-search-answer-generate:nth-of-type(1) > div.undefined.cs-swiper-layout-answer:nth-of-type(1) > div.cos-swiper > div.cos-swiper-content:nth-of-type(1) > div.cos-swiper-list.cos-swiper-transition-none:nth-of-type(2) > div.cos-swiper-item.generate-swiper-item > div.cs-answer-container > div.chat-search-answer-generate-item > div.cs-hover-menu._menu-wrapper_gtq6q_1:nth-of-type(2) > div.cs-answer-hover-menu-container > span:nth-of-type(1) > i.cos-icon.cos-icon-copy
annotations.reason: The annotated selector targets a copy icon in the answer menu which is always present once an answer exists. The correct completion signal is the disappearance of the '._capsule-loading_soow8_88' loading capsule (text: '智能体回答中，请等待'), combined with content stability on the answer markdown container.

steps.name: 等待AI回答完全返回

annotations.reason: The original selector targets the expand container but the actual thinking text is inside nested .cosd-markdown-content .marklang elements. Using the content container ensures we get the full text.

The original selector for answer was too broad and captured the entire ai-entry including thinking steps. The revised selector targets only the markdown answer blocks (ai-markdown class), excluding thinking steps (ai-thinking-steps class). Multiple blocks are joined together.

steps.name: 提取思考过程和答案

userDescription: 在目标网站（百度AI问答）上，点击深度思考按钮开启深度思考模式，将外部传入进来给本系统的问题（字符串）在目标网站的输入框中进行提问，提交问题后等待答案完全返回，提取其中的思考过程和答案，组装成json返回给外部。
